title: 7 Best Moosend Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Moosend alternatives. Compare free and paid email marketing tools for small businesses and creators.
intro: While Moosend offers unlimited emails and affordable pricing, you might be looking for alternatives that better suit your specific needs—whether that's advanced automation, e-commerce integrations, or specialized features for newsletters or creators. We've compared the top email marketing platforms to help you find the perfect fit for your business.
why_switch: Need industry-specific features like e-commerce integrations, webinars, or newsletter monetization
Want advanced automation capabilities combined with CRM functionality
Prefer platforms with stronger customer reviews or better support for your use case

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite matches Moosend's $9 starting price and 1,000 free subscriber limit, but offers a more intuitive drag-drop editor and better Trustpilot rating (4.5 vs 4.4). It's ideal if you value ease of use and want pop-ups and surveys built-in.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv stands out with newsletter monetization, an ad network, and referral programs—features Moosend doesn't offer. It's the best choice if you're building a paid newsletter business or want to monetize your audience directly.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators with visual automations, subscriber tagging, and built-in commerce features. Choose this if you're a blogger or course creator who needs email marketing tailored to your audience type.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email, CRM, lead scoring, and SMS in one platform starting at $15/month. It's the best alternative if you need enterprise-grade automation and want to manage sales pipelines alongside email marketing.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is the most established email marketing platform with strong G2 ratings (4.3) and extensive integrations. It's ideal if you want a trusted, well-documented platform, though it has a lower free subscriber limit (500) than Moosend.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers an unbeatable free tier with 100,000 free contacts and multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat). It's the best choice if you need omnichannel communication or send high volumes of transactional emails.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse combines email marketing with built-in webinars, online courses, and conversion funnels starting at $19/month. It's perfect if you're launching courses, hosting webinars, or building sales funnels alongside email campaigns.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Moosend?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 free contacts and includes email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. However, if you specifically want unlimited emails like Moosend, MailerLite and ConvertKit both offer free plans with 1,000 subscribers and unlimited emails, making them better direct alternatives.

faq.q: What is the best Moosend alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the best direct alternative for small businesses, matching Moosend's $9 starting price and 1,000 free subscriber limit while offering superior ease of use with its drag-drop editor and pop-ups. For slightly more advanced needs, GetResponse at $19/month adds webinars and funnels without significant complexity.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Moosend?
faq.a: Brevo is cheaper with a free plan supporting up to 100,000 contacts, making it ideal if you have a large list and want to delay paid upgrades. For paid plans, both Moosend and MailerLite start at $9/month, but Brevo's free tier is substantially more generous than Moosend's 1,000-subscriber limit.
